proved: Data ingest lane works end-to-end against a keyless live source (Yahoo Finance chart API). All 6 basket tickers (SPY, QQQ, AAPL, NVDA, TSLA, BTC-USD) return real OHLCV bars.

Strategy fleet produces a ranked $10 leaderboard with mathematically correct endValue (10 * (1 + sum(weight_i * session_return_i))). Captain verified directly against the artifact: Mean-Reversion 10.2561, Volatility-Breakout 10.1174, Equal-Weight 10.0569, Trend-Follow 10.0195, Buy-&-Hold SPY 9.9908, Momentum 9.9289 (sample run); live 2026-06-16 run also validated.
Report artifact (JSON + MD) generated per session with explicit data-source labeling (LIVE/CACHE/SAMPLE) and a sample-data warning banner when the fallback fires.

Live run for 2026-06-16 session: winner Volatility-Breakout (stayed CASH on a down day, $10.00 -> $10.00); loser Momentum (picked NVDA, $10.00 -> $9.76 = -2.37%). Strategies produce differentiated outcomes on real market data.
remaining_work: task-2026-06-02-017: broker-gated paper/live execution adapter — blocked on Fritz's broker credentials (Alpaca paper recommended first). Cannot progress without a Fritz decision.
Multi-session aggregator not yet built — current harness writes one artifact per session; cross-session win-rate / cumulative-$ / Sharpe-like measure is a separate follow-up task.

evidence.note: Data ingest rewritten from Stooq CSV to Yahoo Finance chart JSON. Yahoo endpoint: https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/<SYM>?period1=<unix>&period2=<unix>&interval=1d. Keyless, no API key required.
6 distinct strategies: Momentum, Mean-Reversion, Trend-Follow SMA10/20, Buy-&-Hold SPY, Equal-Weight Basket, Volatility-Breakout. All deterministic rule-based.
Runner writes JSON leaderboard + MD report per session, with sample-data warning banner when fallback fires.
Live Yahoo data leaderboard for the 2026-06-16 session. Winner: Volatility-Breakout (stayed CASH). Loser: Momentum (NVDA, -2.37%).
Human-readable report with corrected Yahoo banner.
open_tasks reduced to just task-2026-06-02-017; known_gaps updated to reflect Yahoo Finance as the data source.
Rows for task-2026-06-02-014, 015, 016 updated to status=completed with completed_at and proof fields. Task 017 remains status=blocked.

memory_candidates.title: Yahoo Finance chart endpoint is keyless and works for daily OHLCV
memory_candidates.body: https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/<SYMBOL>?period1=<unix>&period2=<unix>&interval=1d returns JSON with timestamp + indicators.quote[0].{open,high,low,close,volume} arrays. No API key, no auth, no cookie. The download endpoint (v7/finance/download) requires login; the chart endpoint does not. Works for SPY, QQQ, AAPL, NVDA, TSLA, BTC-USD as of 2026-06-17. Rate limits unknown but a single 6-symbol basket fetch is fine. Yahoo may add a crumb-cookie wall later — keep the cache fallback.

memory_candidates.title: Stooq daily CSV endpoint is dead for non-browser clients
memory_candidates.body: As of mid-2026, stooq.com/q/d/l/?s=<sym>&i=d returns an HTML page with a JavaScript proof-of-work challenge (SHA-256 leading-zero-nonce) instead of CSV. Plain Node fetch / curl cannot pass the wall — it requires executing JS in a browser to obtain a session cookie. Same wall on stooq.pl. Do not rely on Stooq for any non-browser data ingestion. Use Yahoo Finance chart endpoint or another keyless source instead.

memory_candidates.title: HyperSwarm reviewer lane routed to Tier-A model returned ungrounded verdict
memory_candidates.body: A delegate_task reviewer lane routed to phi4-mini-64k:latest (Tier-A cheap model) for a Tier-C adversarial review job (math + diversity + honesty + URL-pattern verification) returned an ungrounded verdict. It claimed 'math_check fail' with no row citations, reported the wrong URL pattern (cited /stock-market/quote?symbol=SPY which is not what data.js uses), and answered 'overwrite_risk: no' despite the run literally overwriting the prior 2026-05-29-leaderboard.json. Captain re-verified the math directly from the artifact and confirmed all 6 rows were correct. Per HyperSwarm doctrine: reserve premium models for reviewer/breaker lanes. Routing a Tier-C job to a Tier-A model produces noise, not review.

memory_candidates.title: Multi-session performance aggregator not yet built for financial-agents
memory_candidates.body: Current harness writes one leaderboard artifact per session. Cross-session aggregation (win-rate over N sessions, cumulative $10 growth, Sharpe-like risk-adjusted measure, strategy consistency) is not yet built. This is the next maturity step before any broker-gated live execution. Owner: future task under plan financial-agents.
